ham.subject: SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

This is a reminder that your subscription to Acme SaaS Platform will expire on 15 September 2026. To ensure uninterrupted service, please renew your subscription by 10 September 2026.

Click <URL> to review and complete the renewal process.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our support team.

Thank you for your continued partnership.

Best regards,
Acme SaaS Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

We have detected an issue with your payroll information. Immediate action is required to avoid salary withholding.

Please verify your payroll details by clicking <URL> within the next 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in a temporary suspension of your salary disbursement.

If you have already updated your information, please disregard this notice.

Thank you,
HR Payroll Department

Best regards,
John Doe
Senior Payroll Officer
